Guigang Hengdi Clothing Co., Ltd. is a modern clothing factory specializing in high-quality garment manufacturing and cross-border supply chain services. With 10 years of industry experience, committed to providing global customers with one-stop OEM/ODM solutions.

01 — Company Profile

About HENDI Apparel

Guigang Hengdi Garments Co., Ltd. was established in August 2019 and is located in Dacheng Industrial Park, Pingnan County, Guigang City, Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region.

There are over 100 employees in the factory, with more than years of experience in producing foreign sweaters and clothing. Our company has passed the SMETA 4 PILLAR certification.

We can produce men's and women's styles ranging from 3GG to 14GG, with 100 computerized automatic knitting machines and an annual output of approximately 1.5 million pieces.
